title: Submit Button Is Disabled During Loading State to Prevent Duplicate Submissions
description: Verifies that once the login form is submitted with valid-format credentials, the submit button becomes disabled (or the form becomes non-interactive) during the pending API request, preventing a second submission before the first completes.
expected_result: After the initial form submission, the submit button transitions to a disabled state for the duration of the pending API call, and a loading indicator is shown. A second click on the disabled button does not fire an additional request. The form re-enables only after the API responds.

test_steps.action: Fill the email field with a valid-format email
Fill the password field with a password
Click the submit button to trigger the login request
test_steps.expected: Form is submitted and a loading indicator appears

test_steps.action: Immediately verify the submit button is disabled while the request is in flight
test_steps.expected: The submit button is in a disabled state during loading, preventing a second click

test_steps.action: Attempt to click the disabled submit button a second time
test_steps.expected: Click is ignored; no additional network request is triggered; loading state persists
